action_plan.action: Create and approve a portfolio pre-registration draft, then run a separate portfolio trial dry-run; do not reuse factory-search metrics as evidence.
action_plan.title: Factory search is diagnostic-only

action_plan.action: Resolve PIT, delisted, or proxy-data warnings before interpreting this as real strategy evidence.
action_plan.title: Data quality keeps this diagnostic-only

gate_panel.detail: Any proxy, active-only, PIT, or survivorship warning keeps the portfolio diagnostic-only.
Generated catalog components are hypothesis discovery recipes, not pre-registered evidence.
Requires at least 3 saved strategy components for a toy diagnostic portfolio.
Blocks when the best component explains more than 40% of positive portfolio contribution.
Warns when one sleeve dominates capital allocation.
High correlation means components may be the same hidden bet.
Reports the worst local drawdown of the composed portfolio.
Replays the portfolio after removing its best component.
Replays the portfolio with 1.5x declared component costs.

portfolio_search.objective: maximize validation-weighted robust score after duplicate removal, cost stress, contribution concentration, and correlation penalties

overfit_controls.why_not_full_optimization: A fully flexible optimizer would overfit saved dry-run artifacts and manufacture fake edge.

strategy_deduplication.rule: same generated recipe OR same template + same analysis mode + absolute return correlation >= 0.98

required_next_step: Archive if blockers remain; otherwise require a new external-data/PIT gate before any stronger claim.
